profile.name: J. Harshavardhan
profile.tagline: I build reliable AI experiences with strong backend foundations and product-focused thinking.
profile.summary: Final-year B.Tech AI and ML student at GIST, focused on production-grade GenAI systems and full-stack implementation.

projects.name: Medical Report Summarizer
projects.shortDescription: AI tool that summarizes medical reports and flags hallucinations before response delivery.
projects.fullDescription: This project combines LLM prompting, response validation, and a user-friendly interface for medical report summarization. I designed safeguards to reduce hallucinated outputs and emphasized reliability in high-stakes content.
highlights: Built end-to-end system across backend inference and frontend experience
Added hallucination checks for safer medical AI responses
Deployed and tested in production-like usage scenarios
outcomes: Improved response trust with explicit hallucination control
Demonstrated real-world GenAI product delivery skills

projects.name: AI-FEASTA
projects.shortDescription: Unified chatbot and image generation workflow inside one application.
projects.fullDescription: AI-FEASTA is a multi-feature GenAI platform where users can switch between conversational and visual generation tasks. I focused on API orchestration, latency-aware UX, and session continuity.
highlights: Integrated multiple model providers in a single interface
Designed smooth UX for switching between chat and image outputs
Implemented authentication and persistent storage using Firebase
outcomes: Reduced user friction by consolidating AI workflows
Strengthened practical experience with multi-model systems

images.caption: Dual panel workflow for chat and image generation

projects.name: ChurnGuard
projects.shortDescription: Telecom churn prediction pipeline with preprocessing and evaluation.
projects.fullDescription: ChurnGuard covers a full ML lifecycle from raw data cleaning to model evaluation. I built robust preprocessing pipelines, compared multiple baselines, and tuned features for measurable performance gains.
highlights: Implemented full preprocessing and model training workflow
Compared classification approaches with ROC-AUC based evaluation
Documented pipeline for repeatability and handoff
outcomes: Built reusable patterns for future ML projects

projects.name: TrendPulse
projects.shortDescription: Reddit ETL pipeline for trend extraction and downstream analysis.
projects.fullDescription: TrendPulse ingests and transforms Reddit discussions into structured datasets for trend analysis. The focus was consistency, data cleanliness, and basic automation for recurring ingestion.
highlights: Built extract-transform-load flow for social data
Normalized post/comment content for easier analytics
Prepared outputs for dashboard and reporting consumption
outcomes: Enabled fast experimentation for trend-based insights
Improved data engineering fundamentals for ML use cases

skillGroups.title: Programming Languages
skillGroups.summary: Balanced across backend, scripting, and web development work.
skillGroups.details: I use Java for DSA and problem-solving depth, Python for ML and backend development, JavaScript for frontend interaction, and SQL for data retrieval and reporting.

skillGroups.title: AI and LLM Engineering
skillGroups.summary: Hands-on integration of multiple model APIs and prompt strategies.
skillGroups.details: I have worked with Groq, Claude, and Gemini APIs in real projects. I focus on prompt design, evaluation-driven iteration, and reducing hallucinated responses for dependable outputs.

skillGroups.title: Frameworks and Platforms
skillGroups.summary: Full-stack implementation with modern frontend and backend tooling.
skillGroups.details: My common stack is React and Vite on the frontend with FastAPI services in the backend. I use Firebase where authentication and managed storage are needed.

skillGroups.title: ML and Data Skills
skillGroups.summary: Applied model-building with disciplined preprocessing and evaluation.
skillGroups.details: I work with Pandas for data handling, Scikit-learn for modeling, and EDA workflows to understand feature behavior. I also built collaborative filtering and churn prediction pipelines.

skillGroups.title: Tools and Delivery
skillGroups.summary: Versioned, testable, and deployment-ready development practices.
skillGroups.details: I use Git and GitHub for source control, Postman for API testing, and Vercel for deployment workflows. Tooling is chosen to maintain speed and reliability.

achievements.title: Generative AI Engineer Intern
achievements.details: Building and shipping AI features for practical educational use-cases, including production-integrated summarization tools.
impact: Delivered real product features under timelines
Applied LLM reliability patterns in production contexts

achievements.title: Campus Mantri
achievements.details: Led campus campaigns for GATE and SkillUp while helping students discover DSA and interview preparation pathways.
impact: Improved peer engagement in technical learning tracks

achievements.title: AI and ML Certificate Program
achievements.details: Completed applied coursework in EDA, preprocessing, model building, and collaborative filtering systems.
impact: Built stronger foundations in practical ML
Converted theory into deployable project workflows

achievements.title: Automotive Service Technician Certification
achievements.details: Earned LEAP certification emphasizing technical process, diagnostics, and disciplined execution.
